_comment: OmniChest English (en_us) — also acts as the canonical fallback for missing keys in other locales.
config.omnichest.title: OmniChest Settings
config.omnichest.general.enableMod.toolt: Master switch. Disabling this turns off every feature in this mod.
config.omnichest.general.debugMode.toolt: Print verbose logs. Recommended only when reporting an issue.
config.omnichest.general.enableSounds.to: Play mod-specific UI sounds (sort complete, deposit, etc.).
config.omnichest.sort.insertEmptySeparat: Leave a blank slot between categories.
config.omnichest.sort.useItemTags.toolti: Group items by datapack tags (e.g. minecraft:logs).
config.omnichest.sort.useCreativeTabGrou: Order categories the same way the creative inventory tabs do.
config.omnichest.sort.autoCompactAfterSo: After sorting, automatically merge partial stacks.
config.omnichest.compact.compactPlayerIn: Also merge stacks inside the player inventory.
Lower = faster but risk of server rate-limit.
config.omnichest.compact.maxActionsPerTi: Upper bound for click actions dispatched per tick.
config.omnichest.deposit.matchNbtCompone: Strict mode: enchanted items only stack with identical enchantments.
config.omnichest.deposit.ignoreEmptySlot: Only deposit into chests already holding that item.
config.omnichest.deposit.hotkey.notice: Auto Deposit hotkey: use the vanilla Controls screen → ‘OmniChest’ category.
config.omnichest.lock.enableItemLockMode: Track item by identity (e.g. follow Diamond Pickaxe across slots).
config.omnichest.lock.hotkey.notice: Lock hotkeys live in vanilla Controls → ‘OmniChest’ category.
config.omnichest.search.searchRadius.too: Higher = more chests found, but heavier scan cost.
config.omnichest.search.highlightDuratio: 0 = highlight stays until results are cleared.
config.omnichest.search.pinPersistUntilO: Keep the pin / highlight visible until you actually open that chest. Overrides Highlight Duration when ON.
config.omnichest.search.enableCategoryTa: Show Creative Inventory-style tabs at the top of the search screen.
Star items so they sort to the top and can be filtered in the Favorites tab.
config.omnichest.search.favoriteHighligh: Add a golden glow to favorited items in the result list.
config.omnichest.search.rememberLastDisp: If ON, the last selected display mode is reused next time you open the screen.
config.omnichest.search.compactTabMode.t: Show icon-only category tabs (no expanded label even for the current tab).
config.omnichest.search.defaultDisplayMo: Initial display mode when opening the search screen.
config.omnichest.ai.learningMode.tooltip: Update category weights from your deposit history.
config.omnichest.ai.autoCategorizeEmptyC: Prompt for the category when opening a newly placed empty chest.
Below this value the chest is treated as MIXED storage.
config.omnichest.template.autoApplyTempl: Apply matching saved template automatically when opening a chest.
config.omnichest.template.saveEmptySlots: Record empty slots so they stay empty after apply.
config.omnichest.render.highlightColorRg: Outline color used to highlight matched chests.
config.omnichest.compat.enableShaderComp: Switch to a shader-safe render path when Iris or Oculus is installed.
config.omnichest.compat.safeOverlayRende: Wrap overlay draws in a guarded matrix stack so a single failure can't break the rest of the screen.
config.omnichest.compat.disableExperimen: Opt out of any future experimental render paths. Has no effect today.
config.omnichest.compat.enableOptionalIn: Allow hooks for REI, EMI, Inventory Profiles and similar mods when they are installed.
config.omnichest.compat.strictCompatibil: Disable every integration and use the most conservative render paths. Handy for isolating conflicts.
Print verbose logs from the compatibility layer. Recommended only when reporting an issue.
config.omnichest.compat.enableResourcePa: Master switch for texture / atlas / font safety layers. UI layout, colors and animations are not affected.
config.omnichest.compat.safeTextureFallb: When a texture or sprite is missing, draw a vanilla missing-texture placeholder instead of crashing or dropping the frame.
config.omnichest.compat.fontSafetyMode.t: Truncate or wrap text safely so unicode / CJK / bitmap font packs do not overflow. UI sizes stay unchanged.
config.omnichest.compat.debugTextureLogs: Print verbose logs whenever a texture / sprite / font falls back. Recommended only when diagnosing a resource pack.
config.omnichest.keybind.intro: All hotkeys live under ‘OmniChest’ in vanilla Controls → Key Binds.
config.omnichest.language.intro: Choose how the mod displays text. "System Default" follows Minecraft's language.
config.omnichest.language.override.toolt: Override the in-mod language. Use "System Default" to follow Minecraft.
config.omnichest.language.rtl_mode.toolt: Mirror UI horizontally for right-to-left languages. Auto follows the selected language; Force overrides it.
config.omnichest.language.unicode_font_s: Prefer safe truncation for non-ASCII text so it never overflows widget boxes.
config.omnichest.language.restart_hint: Most labels update immediately. A few cached titles may need re-opening the screen.
omnichest.screen.search.title: Chest Search
omnichest.screen.template.save.title: Save Template
omnichest.screen.template.manager.title: Templates
omnichest.screen.template.preview.title: Template Preview
omnichest.button.category_sort.tooltip:
Sort chest contents by category.

Items are grouped by meaning — building, wood, ore, food, and so on —
and identical stacks are merged into one.

Locked slots stay where they are.
omnichest.button.deposit.tooltip:
Move items from your inventory into this chest,
but only items that are already present here.

Locked slots are skipped.
omnichest.button.compact.tooltip:
Merge partial stacks of the same item together.

Shift + Click: also compacts your inventory.
omnichest.button.search_network.tooltip:
Search every chest you have opened on this server.
Find any item and see where it is stored.
omnichest.button.save_template.tooltip: Save the current arrangement of this chest as a reusable template.
omnichest.button.apply_template.tooltip: Reorganise this chest to match a saved template.
omnichest.button.manage_templates.toolti: Browse, rename, duplicate, reorder, or delete your saved templates.
omnichest.button.sort_by_type.tooltip:
Sort this chest by item type
(building, wood, ore, food, ...).
omnichest.button.sort_by_count.tooltip: Sort this chest by item count, largest stacks first.
omnichest.button.layout_left.tooltip: Move the button panel to the left of the chest.
omnichest.button.layout_right.tooltip: Move the button panel to the right of the chest.
omnichest.button.set_category.tooltip: Mark this chest as the destination for a category of items.
omnichest.button.auto_distribute.tooltip:
Send items from this chest and your inventory to
each registered category chest automatically.
omnichest.editbox.search.tooltip: Highlight items in this chest by name.
omnichest.controls.title: Controls
omnichest.controls.line.slot_lock_alt_cl: Alt + Left Click: Toggle slot lock
omnichest.controls.line.item_lock_cycle: Shift + Alt + Click: Cycle slot/item lock
omnichest.controls.line.alt_hover_shulke: Alt + Hover Shulker Box: Preview contents
omnichest.controls.line.shift_compact: Shift + Click Compact: Compact player too
omnichest.editbox.search.label: Search
omnichest.editbox.name.label: Name
omnichest.search.hint: Click row = toggle selection  /  "Find Selected" pins them  /  ESC = cancel
omnichest.template.kind.label: Kind: %1$s
omnichest.template.kind.help.exact: Oak Planks and Birch Planks are treated as different items.
omnichest.template.kind.help.category: Items in the same category can substitute each other. (Best for material chests)
omnichest.template.kind.help.hybrid: Prefers the original item, falls back to same-category substitutes.
omnichest.template.manager.hint: Click row = Apply (requires a chest) / Buttons on the right / ESC = close
omnichest.template.preview.shortages: Short items: %1$d kinds (some slots cannot be filled)
omnichest.template.preview.stranded: Stranded slots: %1$d (no place to put these items)
omnichest.slot_lock.chat.confirm_clear: §e[Slot Lock] §rPress again within 1.5s to clear %1$d locks.
omnichest.smart_storage.plan_empty: [Smart Storage] Deposit plan: no items / feature off
omnichest.search.display_mode.label: Display Mode
omnichest.search.favorites.add_tooltip: Right-click or Alt+Click to add to favorites
omnichest.search.favorites.remove_toolti: Right-click or Alt+Click to remove from favorites
omnichest.search.favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Right-click any item to star it.
omnichest.color_picker.title: Color Picker
omnichest.distribution.title: Storage Distribution
omnichest.distribution.hint: Open a chest → [Set Category] to register  /  [Auto Distribute] to sort  /  ESC = close
omnichest.distribution.empty.storage: No registered storages. Open a chest and press [Set Category].
omnichest.distribution.empty.pending: No pending transfers. Press [Auto Distribute] near a chest.
omnichest.distribution.chat.disabled: §7[Auto Distribute] Feature is disabled in config.
omnichest.distribution.chat.summary: §a[Auto Distribute] §rDeposited %1$d, queued %2$d for remote chests, pulled %3$d.
omnichest.distribution.chat.busy: §7[Auto Distribute] Still working… try again in a moment.
omnichest.distribution.set_category.name: Chest Name
omnichest.distribution.set_category.hint: Choose a category, then Save.  ESC = cancel
config.omnichest.distribution.enableAuto: Master switch for the Storage Auto Distribution system (also hides the in-chest buttons when off).
config.omnichest.distribution.autoApplyP: When you open a chest, automatically deposit items that were queued for it.
config.omnichest.distribution.showButton: Show [Set Category] and [Auto Distribute] buttons inside the chest GUI.
config.omnichest.distribution.priorityMo: When several chests share a category: nearest, emptiest, or by priority value.
config.omnichest.distribution.queueSpeed: Ticks between dispatch batches. Higher = slower & safer on strict servers.
config.omnichest.distribution.maxMovesPe: Upper bound for item moves dispatched per tick.
config.omnichest.distribution.showTransf: Animate the flowing dot along transfer arrows in the distribution menu.
config.omnichest.distribution.enableTran: Record completed and failed transfers for the History / Failed tabs.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.omnichest: Find any item across all your chests at a glance. OmniChest adds a network-wide search with in-world pins, smart deposit, category sorting, slot locks, and reusable chest templates — one toolkit to keep your storage tidy.
omnichest.reset_popup.title: Really reset all changes?
omnichest.reset_popup.no_changes: All settings are at default values.
config.omnichest.search.enableBeacon.too: Draw a translucent beacon-like beam rising from each search pin so it stays visible from far away. Pins themselves are unchanged.
config.omnichest.search.beaconOpacity.to: Base opacity of the beam. Combined with fade and pulse.
config.omnichest.search.beaconWidth.tool: Width of the beam core in blocks. The outer glow is wider.
config.omnichest.search.beaconDistanceFa: Dim the beam gradually with distance (it never fully disappears).
Enable a slow pulsing brightness animation on the beam.
config.omnichest.search.enableShulkerSea: Search inside shulker boxes too. Results keep the hierarchy (Chest > Shulker > Item) and highlight each step.
config.omnichest.search.enableEnderChest: Treat the ender chest as player-specific storage and include it in search (dimension-independent, safe across dimensions).
config.omnichest.search.enableNestedCont: Also descend into shulker-in-shulker (nested) containers, up to Max Nested Depth. Requires Enable Shulker Search.
config.omnichest.search.maxNestedDepth.t: How deep to follow nested containers (1 = shulker only). Higher costs more.
config.omnichest.search.enableAltPreview: Hold ALT and hover a shulker box to preview its contents (read-only).
config.omnichest.search.previewGridColum: Number of columns in the ALT preview grid.
config.omnichest.search.previewBackgroun: Dim the area behind the ALT preview panel for readability (lightweight frosted look).
